negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_cc678774-9612-4a5b-a87c-058803533760
prompt: A man records himself talking as he walks down an urban street, capturing a medium shot from a low angle with random camera movements. He is dressed in a white-collar polo shirt with large dark blue and green horizontal stripes and thin white and red stripes. He has short hair, wears wire-framed glasses, and carries a clip-on microphone on his chest. Blue straps are visible around his shoulders, and he holds a cup with a straw in his left hand. His right arm extends out the bottom left of the frame, holding the camera. Initially, he walks with his head down, but in the middle ground to his right, another man in jeans and a beige jacket walks toward the camera alongside a child. Simultaneously, a white-haired man dressed in black stands on a yellow bike, facing the man and the child. The main figure raises his head momentarily, looking straight ahead, then lowers it again. He then turns his head to the right, lifting his gaze upward and slightly to the left. Throughout the sequence, he speaks continuously while walking. The background is slightly out of focus, with parked cars in the middle ground and a blue parking sign near a booth with a gray roof. Beyond the cars, tall buildings rise against a bright, whitish sky, including a four-story building extending to the right until trees block it from view. Toward the end, a loading cart, a gray pickup truck, a red sign with yellow letters, and an aquamarine bike appear on the right. A person in a red sweater with short white hair enters from the right, walking away from the camera.
